title: Redstoneization
description: This mod adds new redstone features! For example, redstone tools, that are something between diamond and netherite.
body:
This mod adds new redstone features! For example, new redstoneized blocks. Using these blocks, you can make a secret emitter of a redstone signal or install a lamp that does not need a redstone signal to glow, making survival easier, since redstone tools are something between diamond and netherite.
The mod also adds a new mob: Rillager, you can find him in his rarely seen houses. He is aggressive towards villagers and the player, and is also afraid of golems.
